data.title: iboss Recognized as a Leader and Outperformer in the GigaOm Radar Report for Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB)
data.description: iboss, a prominent provider of AI-powered Zero Trust SASE solutions, has exhibited remarkable success in Cloud Access Security Broker services. The company showcased its innovative approach in AI-driven CASB and GenAI Data Protection during a recent event in Orlando, Florida, held on April 29, 2026. As a result of its outstanding performance, iboss has earned the title of Leader in the field, reinforcing its position as a top player in the industry. This recognition underscores the firm's commitment to cutting-edge technologies and data security.

data.title: Advanced Real Estate Goes Hollywood with Purchase of Luxury Towers
data.description: In Irvine, California on April 29, 2026, Advanced Real Estate (Advanced) completed the largest multifamily purchase in Southern California of the year by acquiring two prominent properties. The first is the 200-unit Columbia Square Living, which has been rebranded as "Sky Hollywood," and the second is the Jardine Hollywood towers comprising 193 units. These acquisitions mark a significant move for Advanced in the real estate market, as they expand their portfolio with a total of 393 units through these transactions.

data.title: FOREIGN DIRECT INVESTMENT FUELS U.S. MANUFACTURING REBOUND
data.description: After years of uncertainty, the industry is experiencing a resurgence in confidence, with global companies moving forward with significant projects in the United States. Gray will participate in discussions with industry leaders and policymakers at the SelectUSA Investment Summit on May 3, 2026, in Lexington, Ky. This development comes amidst a growing positive sentiment, highlighting a promising outlook for the industry.

data.title: Kevin Kuykendall Launches Scholarship to Cultivate Next Generation of Entrepreneurial Leaders in Business and Healthcare
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Dallas, the Kevin Kuykendall Scholarship for Entrepreneurs has commenced its application process, inviting undergraduate students to apply for a one-time award. This scholarship aims to recognize individuals showcasing remarkable ambition, leadership qualities, and a strong entrepreneurial spirit. The scholarship will be awarded to a deserving student who embodies these characteristics.

data.title: The Multiple Sclerosis Association of America Hosts 12th Improving Lives Benefit in Support of the MS Community
data.description: The 12th Improving Lives Benefit hosted by the Multiple Sclerosis Association of America (MSAA) will include an in-person reception alongside a livestreamed broadcast. Set to take place in Cherry Hill, New Jersey on April 29, 2026, this signature event aims to raise awareness and support for individuals affected by multiple sclerosis. The event is expected to draw a large audience, including both physical attendees and virtual viewers. Join us as we strive to make a difference and improve the lives of those impacted by multiple sclerosis.

data.title: ASPEED to Showcase OBMF-ICP over USB Solution for Streamlined Data Center Management at OCP EMEA Summit
data.description: Hsinchu, April 29, 2026 - ASPEED Technology, a top player in Baseboard Management Controllers (BMC) worldwide, revealed its involvement in the OCP Innovation Village during the OCP EMEA Summit occurring in Barcelona, Spain from April 29-30. ASPEED is set to exhibit its most recent innovations at the event, which will attract various industry participants.

data.title: Ember LifeSciences introduces Ember Cube 2, earns 'Best of the Best' Red Dot Design Award
data.description: A highly acclaimed cold chain solution has officially launched for commercial use, offering increased control and visibility in the delivery of temperature-sensitive medicines. This breakthrough comes as a significant improvement to the healthcare supply chain, which has traditionally operated on inefficient "pack-and-pray" logistics. With this new system in place, it is set to revolutionize the delivery process and ensure the safe handling of medicines requiring specific temperature conditions. Los Angeles witnessed the start of this advancement on April 29, 2026, with the solution now available to meet the rising demand for better pharmaceutical transportation. The introduction of this innovation marks a pivotal moment as it addresses the need for reliability in the distribution of medical supplies.

data.title: Booking Holdings Posts Q1 Earnings Beat, Lowers Outlook On Middle East Conflict
data.description: Booking Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: BKNG) saw a decline in shares following its first-quarter results. Analyst Tom White of DA Davidson maintained a Buy rating and lowered the price target from $240 to $230. BTIG analyst Jake Fuller also reiterated a Buy rating with a price target of $250. According to DA Davidson, Booking's results were solid despite challenges like the Iran war at the end of the quarter. The company exceeded expectations in adjusted EBITDA and earnings. However, room nights and gross bookings were below guidance. Management's forecast for the second quarter indicates ongoing challenges related to the conflict. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Peter H. Tracy Introduces the PHTLive Grant for Creative Minds to Support Undergraduate Innovators in Music and Storytelling
data.description: Peter H. Tracy has introduced the PHTLive Grant for Creative Minds in Boca Raton, Florida on April 29, 2026. This initiative focuses on promoting creative expression, storytelling, and student innovation. The grant aims to support individuals who exhibit exceptional talent in these areas.
